issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or a custom trigger for 'When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck by your effect', not 'Activated'. Current trigger does not capture the return-to-deck event.
Missing duration. Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn.
Condition should check 'LeaderHasType' for {Big Mom Pirates}, not 'HasCardOnBoard'. Current condition type is incorrect.
Action 'GiveDon' is incomplete. Should include 'Rest' action as a separate action since text says 'rest it'. Current DSL only adds DON but does not rest.
Missing '[Once Per Turn]' constraint in DSL structure.
